narrative:
Allen County has 63,190 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.2% of registrants.
